creator: espen@tagestad.no
text:
Here is the latest port which compiles on both 8.x and 9.x.

readline used to be bundled with mysql src distribution up to 5.6.5, but now has to rely on the version installed in the OS or by ports. Because of that, and the fact that the package didn't compile on 8.x whether devel/readline was installed or not, I decided to compile it with WITH_LIBEDIT (editline/libedit) instead - which is a Berkely-style licensed readline replacement.
